mentions.note: Favorite gold company; solid commodity diversifier with excellent fundamentals.
Favorite gold company; solid diversification for portfolio; precious metals exposure.
Preferred gold miner over Barrick; Cramer is a gold bug who buys on dips and holds through rallies.

Gold miner; best miner to participate in gold shortage (only 1% of world holdings replaced annually). Gold up 15% YTD, silver up 46% on dollar weakness and geopolitical uncertainty. Own gold long-term, not crypto (lacks shortage factor for inflation hedge).

#2 largest gold miner by market cap/production. Gold $5,000+ not bubble; geopolitical chaos and government spending sustaining. Tier-1 geology + tier-1 political stability crucial at these prices. 1.5M oz annual production growth over 5 years; 42-yr dividend increase streak; share buybacks ongoing.
Second largest gold miner on Earth; stock shiny (need sunglasses); if don't own gold, buy this; wait for pullback but always own some gold, especially after Bitcoin failure.
Gold sector driven by speculators; Agnico is the preferred gold play—CEO confirms young day traders flipping metals, not fundamentals.
Consistent high-quality gold miner. Cramer's preferred gold pick; known company forever. Prefers Agnico to Newmont due to consistency, though open to learning why Newmont better.
Gold mining exposure. Cramer not bullish on gold; expects prices to move lower.
